title: uragoga schottiana
intro: Uragoga schottiana, also known as the African bitter leaf, is a plant species in the family Urticaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Uragoga schottiana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Uragoga schottiana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Uragoga schottiana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or juice, and is often used in traditional medicine in West Africa, particularly in Nigeria and Ghana.
